content:
🚀 thunderbolt | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a flexible and controllable AI client solution for enterprises and individuals who want to deploy AI models on their own infrastructure, manage their data, and avoid reliance on third-party services.
✨ Key Features: • Open-source, cross-platform AI client • On-premise deployment • Model choice (frontier, local, on-prem) • Data ownership • Eliminates vendor lock-in
📖 Summary: Thunderbolt is an open-source, cross-platform AI client designed for on-premise deployment, allowing users to choose their AI models, own their data, and avoid vendor lock-in. It supports a wide range of platforms and AI models, with features geared towards enterprise use.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
